debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

proof:
exact_mod_cast Finset.prod_le_prod (fun k _ => Nat.zero_le _) (fun k hk => by
          have hk1 : k ≥ 1 := (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk).1
          have hp : nth Nat.Prime k ≥ k + 2 := Nat.add_two_le_nth_prime k
          have h1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) = 1 :=
            Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (by omega) (by omega)
          have h2 : (k + 1) / k ≥ 1 := Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (by omega) |>.mpr (by omega)
          omega)
successful_attempts:
exact_mod_cast Finset.prod_le_prod (fun k _ => Nat.zero_le _) (fun k hk => by
          have hk1 : k ≥ 1 := (Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk).1
          have hp : nth Nat.Prime k ≥ k + 2 := Nat.add_two_le_nth_prime k
          have h1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) = 1 :=
            Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (by omega) (by omega)
          have h2 : (k + 1) / k ≥ 1 := Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (by omega) |>.mpr (by omega)
          omega)
